summary: Completed end-to-end validation of Phase 14+ enhancements: normalize_live_stats_baseball, reinforced Understat fuzzy linker, and asyncio.wait_for timeout wrapper

notes: Live re-evaluation responds in <5s as expected with asyncio.wait_for timeout
Spanish-language fields (reason_es) confirmed in Human Live Interpreter output
Frontend testing not requested - backend only testing scope

passed_tests: ✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/login with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 → returns token
✅ Understat: GET /api/understat/match/26651 → returns enrichment with provenance 'understat_v1' and xG data (home=2.75, away=1.28)
✅ Live Re-Evaluation: POST /api/live/reevaluate → responds in 0.42s (<5s requirement met)
✅ Spanish Language: Human Live Interpreter produces reason_es field correctly
✅ Unit Test: normalize_live_stats_baseball() correctly parses API-Sports baseball payload (inning=8, inning_half=top, innings_played=8, hits/errors/runs)
✅ Unit Test: live_baseball_analytics.compute_live_analysis() produces TRAP_LATE_LEAD verdict when lead>=5 inning>=8 and leader odds <=1.20
✅ Unit Test: understat_scraper.fuzzy_link_match('PSG', 'Marseille') returns match 28127 with xG data (network-dependent test passed)

normalize_live_stats_baseball.validation: Correctly parses API-Sports baseball per-inning runs/hits/errors and exposes them for live_baseball_analytics.compute_live_analysis()

test_results.inning_half_deduction: ✅ Correctly deduced inning_half='top' from innings_runs data

understat_fuzzy_linker.validation: Successfully uses internal /main/getTeamData/<slug>/<year> JSON endpoint with X-Requested-With header, expanded slug map (PSG, Inter, AC Milan), and search-engine fallbacks

test_results.fuzzy_link_psg_marseille: ✅ fuzzy_link_match('PSG', 'Marseille') resolved to match 28127 with xG data (home=0.28, away=4.04)
test_results.enrichment_structure: ✅ Enrichment payload includes xg, shots, ppda, win_probability

asyncio_wait_for_timeout.validation: Live re-evaluation responds in <5s even when scan_protected_alternatives is invoked, thanks to asyncio.wait_for(timeout=3.0) wrap in server.py

baseball_live_analytics.validation: compute_live_analysis() correctly consumes normalize_live_stats_baseball output and produces TRAP_LATE_LEAD verdict

test_results.verdict_classification: ✅ TRAP_LATE_LEAD when lead>=5 inning>=8 and leader odds <=1.20
test_results.home_away_blocks: ✅ Home/away blocks present with runs, hits, errors, run_rate, threat_score

spanish_language_fields.validation: Human Live Interpreter produces reason_es field correctly when called via /api/live/reevaluate

test_results.narration_field: ✅ Spanish narration present: 'Ritmo bajo, defensas dominando. Under es un perfil...'
test_results.interpreter_structure: ✅ Interpreter payload includes title, subtitle, mood, action, narration in Spanish

critical_notes: ✅ asyncio.wait_for(timeout=3.0) wrapper around scan_protected_alternatives is present and working (DO NOT REMOVE)
✅ Understat /main/getTeamData/ endpoint REQUIRES X-Requested-With:XMLHttpRequest header (confirmed in implementation)
✅ normalize_live_stats_baseball lives in services/normalizer.py and is delegated to from normalize_live_stats_generic when sport=='baseball'
✅ All response narrative fields for user-facing copilot remain in Spanish (reason_es)
